channel.title: Microsoft Service Health Tracker — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Microsoft 365 service health incidents — tracked and searchable

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Some users may see an error when sending messages from BizChat and the BizChat side pane in Microsoft 365 apps.
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Some users may have seen an error when sending messages from BizChat and the BizChat side pane in Microsoft 365 apps.

item.title: [Microsoft Teams] Some users may experience delays receiving notifications for Teams Recap Podcasts in Microsoft Teams
item.description: [Microsoft Teams] Users may have experienced delays receiving notifications for Teams Recap Podcasts in Microsoft Teams.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may be unable to drag and drop files to add references into Microsoft Copilot Notebooks
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to drag and drop files to add references into Copilot Notebooks.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may be unable to track open email counts in the Microsoft 365 admin center organizational messages
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may be unable to track open email counts in the Microsoft 365 admin center organizational messages.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365) usage reports from the Microsoft 365 admin center may be delayed for admins and users
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Microsoft Copilot usage reports from the Microsoft 365 admin center may have been delayed for admins and users.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 apps] Microsoft 365 Apps usage reports from the Microsoft 365 admin center may be delayed for admins and users
item.description: [Microsoft 365 apps] Microsoft 365 Apps usage reports from the Microsoft 365 admin center may have been delayed for admins and users.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may see stale non-Copilot usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center in the Europe and Asia Pacific region
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have seen stale non-Copilot usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center for Europe and Asia Pacific.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins in Europe may not see Copilot Cowork reports in the expected timeframe in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins in Europe may have not seen Copilot Cowork reports in the expected timeframe in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Some users may be unable to export Microsoft Intune reports
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users may have been unable to export Microsoft Intune reports.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some admins can't access Copilot Agent report data in the Microsoft 365 admin center from July 14, 2026
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins couldn't access Copilot Agent report data in the Microsoft 365 admin center from July 14, 2026.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may not see any consumption or charges being recorded for pay-as-you-go (PAYG) Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may not have seen any consumption or charges being recorded for their PAYG Copilot subscription.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users in North America may be unable to access Microsoft 365 Copilot in Microsoft Teams
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users in North America may have been unable to access Microsoft Copilot in Microsoft Teams.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to view location and subject details for other users' Exchange Online calendar items
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to view location and subject details for other users' Exchange Online calendar items.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Users' newly enrolled Windows devices are marked as non-compliant in Microsoft Intune
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users' newly enrolled Windows devices were marked as non-compliant in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users were unable to see conference room availability for Exchange Online through a room-booking application
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users were unable to see conference room availability for Exchange Online through a room-booking application.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some admins may be unable to make changes to distribution lists in Exchange Online and receive an error
item.description: [Exchange Online] Admins may have been unable to make changes to distribution lists in Exchange Online and received an error.

item.title: [Microsoft OneDrive] Some users may have been unable to access Microsoft OneDrive content and may have noticed delays or navigation errors
item.description: [Microsoft OneDrive] Users may have been unable to access OneDrive content and may have noticed delays or navigation errors.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to view mailbox storage data in Outlook and Outlook on the web
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable to view mailbox storage data in Outlook and Outlook on the web.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may have been unable to open or use custom Copilot agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot and received an error
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to open or use custom Copilot agents and received an error.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Some users' document libraries and list views using multiple group filters may have not displayed results in SharePoint
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users' document libraries and list views using multiple group filters may have not displayed results in SharePoint.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may see delays to threat intelligence reports in the Security Operation Center (SOC)
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may have seen delays to threat intelligence reports in the SOC.

item.title: [Microsoft Teams] Mac users may see distorted content when sharing their full screen in Microsoft Teams meetings or recordings
item.description: [Microsoft Teams] Mac users may have seen distorted content when sharing their full screen in Microsoft Teams meetings or recordings.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may be unable to view or select specific GPT-based models in Microsoft 365 Copilot chat
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may be unable to view or select specific GPT-based models in Microsoft 365 Copilot chat.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins' Microsoft 365 Groups, Teams user, and Teams device reports may be delayed in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins' Microsoft 365 Groups, Teams user, and device reports may have been delayed in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users are unable to access Microsoft Copilot web and m365.cloud.microsoft
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users were intermittently unable to access Copilot web and other pages that redirect to the m365.cloud.microsoft URL.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users in Japan may experience issues accessing Microsoft services including Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users in Japan may have experienced issues accessing Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to manage custom Microsoft Graph connectors in Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to manage custom Microsoft Graph connectors in Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may receive response failures or a degraded experience when using Researcher in Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have received response failures or a degraded experience when using Researcher in Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Due to a third-party networking issue, users in Australia may be unable to access Microsoft 365 services
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Due to a third-party networking issue, users in Australia may have been unable to access Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access sign-out button or account details across multiple Microsoft 365 web services
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access sign-out button or account details across multiple Microsoft 365 web services.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may encounter crashes in the classic Outlook desktop app when right clicking in an email message
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have encountered crashes in the classic Outlook desktop app when right clicking in an email message.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may not see the search bar or features when creating Microsoft 365 Copilot notebooks on the desktop client
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may not have seen the search bar or features when creating Copilot notebooks on the desktop client.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users had access to scheduled prompts in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat when they shouldn't have
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users had access to scheduled prompts in Copilot Chat when they shouldn't have.

item.title: [Microsoft OneDrive] Some users may be unable to access or experienced degraded performance when using Microsoft OneDrive
item.description: [Microsoft OneDrive] Users may have been unable to access or experienced degraded performance when using OneDrive.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Users couldn't access the Microsoft Defender for Endpoint on Linux service upon rebooting after a version upgrade
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Users couldn't access the Microsoft Defender for Endpoint on Linux service upon rebooting after a version upgrade.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to access or experience degraded performance when using SharePoint Online
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may have been unable to access or experience degraded performance when using SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to generate content through the Microsoft 365 Copilot Create web app
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to generate content through the Microsoft 365 Copilot Create web app.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to view SharePoint Online files that are linked by Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat or Copilot agents
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to view SharePoint Online files that were linked by Copilot Chat or Copilot agents.

item.title: [Power BI] Users may be intermittently unable to export reports with sensitivity labels in Power BI
item.description: [Power BI] Users may have been intermittently unable to export reports with sensitivity labels in Power BI.

item.title: [Microsoft Teams] Admins may be unable to enforce Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies in Microsoft Teams
item.description: [Microsoft Teams] Admins may have been unable to enforce DLP policies in Microsoft Teams.

item.title: [Microsoft Teams] Some users may have been unable to schedule Microsoft Teams meetings through the classic Outlook desktop client
item.description: [Microsoft Teams] Users may have been unable to schedule Microsoft Teams meetings through the classic Outlook desktop client.

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] We've detected a Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention issue in your environment
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] If action isn't taken, you may continue to see an error banner in Microsoft Edge for Business.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some admins may see incorrect classifications of Cowork Tasks in Microsoft 365 Copilot Cowork usage reports
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have seen incorrect classifications of Cowork Tasks in Copilot Cowork usage reports.

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] Users may experience delays in Data Loss Prevention (DLP) alerts being generated or delivered in Microsoft Purview
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] Users may have experienced delays in Data Loss Prevention alerts being generated or delivered in Microsoft Purview.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Admins may be unable to perform actions involving Domain Name System (DNS) records within the Exchange admin center
item.description: [Exchange Online] Admins may have been unable to perform actions involving DNS records within the Exchange admin center.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Admins may be unable to see the configuration search schema mappings in SharePoint Online
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Admins may be unable to see the configuration search schema mappings in SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Some users may see multiple impact scenarios for Microsoft Copilot Researcher
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may have seen multiple impact scenarios for Microsoft Copilot Researcher.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users' Input Method Editor (IME) for Japanese/Korean input may be disabled and may switch to English in Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users' IME for Japanese/Korean input may have been disabled and may have switched to English in Exchange Online.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Admins can't interact with Microsoft Intune Suite features in the Intune admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Admins couldn't interact with Intune Suite features in the Intune admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft Viva] Users may see stale data in Copilot dashboards and analyst workbench reports in Microsoft Viva Insights
item.description: [Microsoft Viva] Users may have seen stale data in Copilot dashboards and analyst workbench reports in Microsoft Viva Insights.
